dialogue.text: I know, when it gets hard, you know it can get hard sometimes, it is the only thing that makes us feel alive, we keep this love in a photograph, we make these

dialogue.ja: 知ってるよ、辛くなる時があるって、時には本当に辛いけど、それが私たちを生きていると感じさせる唯一のものなんだ。この愛を写真に収めて、私たちはこれらの

dialogue.text: memories for ourselves, where our eyes are never closing, hearts are never broken, the times forever frozen still, so you can keep me inside the pocket of your ripped jeans, holding me closer to lies, made, you won't ever be alone, wait for me to come home,

dialogue.text: loving can heal, loving can mend your soul, and it's the only thing that I know, no, I swear it will get easier, remember that with every piece of your,

dialogue.text: and it's the only thing that we do, with us when we die, we keep this love in a photograph, we make these memories for ourselves, where our eyes are never closing, hearts are never broken, the times forever frozen still, so you can keep,

dialogue.text: me inside the pocket of your ripped jeans, holding me closer to lies, made, you won't ever be alone, wait for me, once okay, baby, the only one's complete, inside these pages, you just hold me,

dialogue.ja: 私から君へ、修復する前に帰ってきて、修復する前に帰ってきて、修復する前に帰ってきて、修復する前に帰ってきて、修復する前に帰ってきて、君は私を破れた唇のポケットの中に入れて、彼女の破れたジーンズを持っている、
